title: AdvancedRTPQueue
body:
AdvancedRTPQueue v3.2 – The Ultimate FREE RTP Queue Plugin

Tired of paid RTP queue plugins that lack essential features? This plugin is completely free, feature-rich, and optimized for production servers. --- ## 🔥 Version 3.2 – Major Performance & Stability Update AdvancedRTPQueue v3.2 introduces a complete rewrite of the teleport engine, improved safety checks, and major performance optimizations for high-load servers. --- ## ✨ Why Choose AdvancedRTPQueue? * ✅ **Free & Unrestricted** – No hidden paywalls * ✅ **Smart Queue System** – Automatically pairs players * ✅ **Safe Teleportation** – Advanced safety validation * ✅ **Fully Customizable** – Messages, sounds, teleport settings * ✅ **Optimized & Lag-Free** – Built for high-performance servers * ✅ **Async + Main Thread Safe** – No unsafe world access * ✅ **Cache-Based Teleport System** – Faster and more reliable RTP * ✅ **Multi-World Support** * ✅ **Cooldown System** *(Global + Per World + Pre-Teleport)* * ✅ **Land Claim Protection** *(GriefPrevention, Factions, Towny)* * ✅ **Nether Roof Protection** * ✅ **Improved Fallback System** * ✅ **Admin Reload Command** * ✅ **Queue Auto-Clear** * ✅ **No Dependencies Needed** --- ## ⚡ What's New in v3.2 * 🔄 Rewritten teleport search engine *(per-world async model)* * 🧠 Intelligent location caching + auto refresh * 🛡️ Improved safe teleport checks *(ground + headroom validation)* * 🔥 Nether roof protection added * 🌍 Strict world-border validation * 📉 Reduced lag from unsafe async usage * 🎯 Better fallback teleport system * ✨ Optimized particle handling *(no broadcast spam)* * 🔧 Improved reload handling + cache reinitialization * 💬 New cancellation message states --- ## 🎮 Commands * `/rtpqueue` → Join queue *(rtpqueue.use)* * `/rtpqueue cancel` → Leave queue *(rtpqueue.use)* * `/rtpqueue reload` → Reload config *(rtpqueue.admin)* * `/rtpqueue world ` → Select world *(rtpqueue.world.*)* --- ## ⚙️ Key Teleport Features * ✔ Cache warmup & periodic refill * ✔ Configurable cache refresh interval * ✔ Safe fallback scanning system * ✔ Configurable safety radius checks * ✔ Forced spawn fallback option * ✔ Claim protection enforcement --- ## 📥 Installation Guide 1. Download the `.jar` file 2. Place it in `/plugins/` 3. Restart your server 4. Edit `config.yml` 5. Done ✅ --- ## ❤️ Support This Project (Optional) This plugin is completely free, but maintaining it takes time. If you’d like to support development: **PayPal:** [shazabmustafa2@gmail.com](mailto:shazabmustafa2@gmail.com) --- ## 🚀 Download Now & Upgrade Your Server ✔ Stop paying for overpriced RTP plugins ✔ Get a modern, optimized solution for FREE ✔ Built for serious servers **Upgrade your server today.**
